text.name: store_searchDialog_info
text.text:
Create a search assignment for our broker. You can choose one of three options:
 1. Normal search (<1 month, ~65% chance)
 2. Extended search (<3 months, ~80% chance)
 3. Continous search (a year, ~98% chance)

A longer assignment increases the search area and the chance of success, but at a higher cost.
